word: G4807 - συκάμινος - sykáminos - soo-kam'-ee-nos - Sycamine tree

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συκάμινος

- Transliteration: Sukaminos

- Phonetic: soo-kam'-ee-nos

- Definition:

1. sycamine tree, having the form and foliage of the mulberry, but fruit resembling the fig

- Origin: of hebrew origin H8256 in imitation of G4809

- TDNT entry: 19:38,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H8256] in imitation of G4809; a sycamore or fig tree: - sycamine tree.
